name: VPC Peering Connection Setup
description: Establish VPC peering connection between two VPCs for private network communication

template.description: Setting up VPC peering between {{sourceVPC}} and {{targetVPC}} to enable private communication for {{trafficType}}. Expected bandwidth: {{bandwidth}} Gbps. Will update route tables, security groups, and NACLs to allow traffic flow while maintaining security boundaries.
template.currentState: Two isolated VPCs: {{sourceVPC}} (production apps) and {{targetVPC}} (shared services). Currently communicating via public internet with VPN. Security groups restrict traffic to specific IPs. NAT gateways for outbound traffic.
template.proposedState: VPC peering connection established with route table updates in both VPCs. Security groups updated to allow traffic from peer VPC CIDR blocks. NACLs configured for {{trafficType}}. DNS resolution enabled across peering connection.
template.trafficPatterns: Primary use case: {{trafficType}} from {{sourceVPC}} to {{targetVPC}}. Expected {{bandwidth}} Gbps peak bandwidth. Latency-sensitive traffic requiring sub-10ms response times. 24/7 operation with higher load during business hours.
